summary: The system is designed to be scalable and handle a large number of requests

rules.name: Only authorized personnel can create new aerial resources
Only authorized personnel can report new fires
Only authorized personnel can create new transmission lines
Only authorized personnel can create new sensors
Only authorized personnel can create new resources
Only authorized personnel can report new incidents
Only authorized personnel can create new coordination efforts
Only authorized personnel can report new road closures

code_skeleton.models:
# SQLAlchemy models generated by Baxel

from sqlalchemy import Column, String, Integer, DateTime, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import relationship, declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class AerialResources(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'aerial_resources'
    # Aerial resources used for firefighting

    id = Column(String(36), primary_key=True, nullable=False)
    type = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    location = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False)

class Fires(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'fires'
    # Fires detected by the system

    id = Column(String(36), primary_key=True, nullable=False)
    location = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    size = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False)

class TransmissionLines(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'transmission_lines'
    # Transmission lines used for power distribution

    id = Column(String(36), primary_key=True, nullable=False)
    location = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    voltage = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False)

class Sensors(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'sensors'
    # Sensors used for detecting faults and fires

    id = Column(String(36), primary_key=True, nullable=False)
    type = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    location = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False)

class Resources(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'resources'
    # Resources used for firefighting

    id = Column(String(36), primary_key=True, nullable=False)
    type = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    location = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False)

class Incidents(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'incidents'
    # Incidents reported by the system

    id = Column(String(36), primary_key=True, nullable=False)
    type = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    location = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False)

class Coordination(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'coordination'
    # Coordination efforts between agencies

    id = Column(String(36), primary_key=True, nullable=False)
    agency = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    incident_id = Column(String(36), nullable=False, ForeignKey('incidents.id'))
    created_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False)

class RoadClosures(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'road_closures'
    # Road closures due to fires or other incidents

    id = Column(String(36), primary_key=True, nullable=False)
    location = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    reason = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False)

chaos_scenarios.failure_description: PostgreSQL database connection loss under peak load
chaos_scenarios.impact_analysis: All endpoints relying on database will be unavailable
chaos_scenarios.mitigation_strategy: Implement database connection pooling and retry mechanism

chaos_scenarios.failure_description: Redis cache server overload under peak load
chaos_scenarios.impact_analysis: All endpoints relying on cache will be unavailable
chaos_scenarios.mitigation_strategy: Implement cache server clustering and load balancing

chaos_scenarios.failure_description: Transmission line failure under peak load
chaos_scenarios.impact_analysis: All endpoints relying on transmission line will be unavailable
chaos_scenarios.mitigation_strategy: Implement redundant transmission lines and failover mechanism

hardening_checklist: Implement load balancing for database and cache servers
Implement redundant transmission lines and failover mechanism
Implement database connection pooling and retry mechanism
